title: Optimize Checkpoint Performance for Large Models - Azure Machine Learning
display_title: Optimize checkpoint performance for large Azure ML models
description: Learn how Nebula can save time, resources, and money for large model training applications
summary: Learn how to boost checkpoint speed and reduce checkpoint cost for large Azure Machine Learning training models using Nebula. Important This article provides information on using thenebulamlpython package with the Azure Container for PyTorch (ACPT). The Nebula package has been deprecated and is no longer available in the latest ACPT images. Thenebulamlpackage isn't available on the public PyPI python package index. To avoid issues, don't attempt to installnebulamlfrom PyPI or using thepipcommand
classification_reason: Provides concrete, product-specific guidance on using Nebula with ACPT to improve checkpoint speed and cost, including configuration patterns and caveats about deprecated packages.

display_title: Map SDK v1 logging APIs to MLflow tracking
